title: [ExportVerilog] Zero width module ports which appear last in a port list cause syntax errors

features.name: module instantiation with trailing comma after named port when last port is zero-width
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation using named port connections where the last port is zero-width, causing a trailing comma syntax error

features.name: zero-width port as last port in module port list
features.description: Code should include a module definition with a zero-width port appearing as the last item in the port list
features.snippet:
module Foo(output [7:0] a, output [0:0] b);
endmodule
